Off Calendar Sep-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (646-290-5247) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Calendar Holdings, Llc is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
